channel.title: Daily Brief
channel.description: 每日中英双语科技与世界新闻摘要 · summarized by Gemini

item.title: WebRTC 协议栈太重，开发者寻求建议
item.description:
[WebRTC] webrtc 的协议栈太重了，根本不想看

The developer is questioning whether to use the libwebrtc library directly or implement their own stack due to its complexity. They are seeking advice from the community on the best approach for WebRTC development.

开发者对 WebRTC 协议栈的复杂性感到困扰，正在询问是直接使用 libwebrtc 库还是自行开发。他们希望能从社区获得关于开发路径的建议。

Tags: webrtc · libwebrtc · development

item.title: Claude Fable5 在 UI 还原任务中表现卓越
item.description:
[Claude] Claude Fable5 还原 Ui 图

Claude Fable5 significantly outperforms previous models like ChatGPT and Opus 4.8 in accurately reconstructing UI designs from screenshots. Users report up to 95% accuracy using Chrome extensions to interface with the tool.

Claude Fable5 在从截图还原 UI 设计的任务中表现远超 ChatGPT 和 Opus 4.8 等模型。用户反馈通过 Chrome 插件配合使用，还原精度可达 95%。

Tags: claude · ui · ai

item.title: 联邦快递的牛市逻辑依赖于尚不可见的利润复苏
item.description:
FedEx: The Bull Case Relies On A Margin Recovery That Isn't Visible Yet

The bullish investment case for FedEx depends on a margin recovery that is not yet evident in their financial performance. Investors remain cautious as the anticipated operational improvements have yet to manifest.

联邦快递的看涨投资逻辑依赖于利润率的复苏，但目前在财报中尚未显现。投资者保持审慎，因为预期的运营改善尚未落地。

Tags: fedex · stocks · finance

item.title: 北京求租新能源车牌
item.description:
[北京] 求租一个北京新能源牌照

A Beijing resident with a local household registration is seeking to rent a new energy vehicle license plate. The purpose is to buy a second-hand electric vehicle to transport their child to school.

一名北京户籍居民正在求租一个新能源车牌。其计划购买二手电车，以方便接送孩子上下学。

Tags: beijing · ev · license

item.title: Telefonica Brasil：这就是 Starlink 不构成威胁的原因
item.description:
Telefonica Brasil: That's Why Starlink Is Not A Threat

Telefonica Brasil argues that Starlink does not pose a significant competitive threat to its existing telecommunications business. The company maintains its market position despite the entry of new satellite internet providers.

Telefonica Brasil 认为 Starlink 对其现有的电信业务构不成重大竞争威胁。尽管有新的卫星互联网服务商进入，公司仍维持其市场地位。

Tags: starlink · telecom · business

item.title: 外包招募：开发 HR 与车队管理系统
item.description:
[酷工作] [外包/合作] 寻产品经理 / 工程师， HR 系统 + 车队管理系统，预算 7~8 万

A project is seeking experienced developers or teams to build HR and fleet management systems for a mining company in Africa. The budget is 70,000-80,000 RMB with a two-week expected delivery timeline.

项目方正在寻找有经验的开发者或小团队，为一家非洲矿业公司开发 HR 和车队管理系统。项目预算 7-8 万人民币，预期两周交付。

Tags: outsourcing · development · hr

item.title: 医生质疑医院的筹款策略
item.description:
‘There was a catch’: My doctor friend was outraged by his hospital’s fundraising tactics. Where do we draw the line?

A doctor is outraged by hospital fundraising tactics that exploit the trust between physicians and their patients. This incident has sparked a debate about where to draw ethical lines in healthcare philanthropy.

一名医生对医院利用医患信任进行筹款的策略感到愤怒。这一事件引发了关于医疗慈善伦理边界的讨论。

Tags: healthcare · ethics · hospitals

item.title: 分享程序员跨界成为业余赛车手的经历
item.description:
[奇思妙想] 分享一下我的斜杠入门：从程序员到赛车手

A programmer shares their transition from a gaming enthusiast to an amateur race car driver. They highlight the importance of learning theoretical knowledge through professional racing books.

一位程序员分享了自己从游戏玩家跨界成为业余赛车手的历程。他强调了通过阅读专业赛车书籍来学习理论知识的重要性。

Tags: racing · hobbies · career

item.title: 2026年机器人行业的领军企业
item.description:
Top Robotics Companies Transforming The Industry In 2026

This report identifies the top robotics companies that are significantly transforming the industrial landscape in 2026. These companies are leading innovations in automation and artificial intelligence applications.

该报告介绍了 2026 年正在改变行业格局的顶尖机器人公司。这些企业在自动化和人工智能应用领域处于领先地位。

Tags: robotics · automation · tech

item.title: IREN：是死钱还是下一个 AI 赢家？
item.description:
IREN: Dead Money Or The Next AI Winner? (Rating Upgrade)

Investors are weighing whether IREN is a stagnating asset or a future leader in the AI space. A recent rating upgrade has prompted renewed interest in the company's potential.

投资者正在评估 IREN 是处于停滞状态还是未来的 AI 赛道赢家。近期评级的上调激发了人们对该公司潜力的重新关注。

Tags: iren · ai · stocks

item.title: 宝洁：高质量已体现在价格中，现在需要耐心
item.description:
Procter & Gamble: Quality Priced In, Patience Now Required

Procter & Gamble's stock price currently reflects its high quality, suggesting that further gains may require significant time. Analysts recommend patience for investors expecting immediate returns.

宝洁的股价已充分反映了其高质量，这意味着后续的涨幅可能需要相当长的时间。分析师建议投资者对短期回报保持耐心。

Tags: procter&gamble · investing · finance

item.title: 俄罗斯对基辅发动大规模袭击，致至少 13 人死亡
item.description:
At least 13 killed in 'most massive' Russian attack on Kyiv

At least 13 people have been killed following what is described as the most massive Russian attack on Kyiv to date. The city's mayor has declared a day of mourning for the victims.

俄罗斯对基辅发动了迄今为止规模最大的一次袭击，造成至少 13 人死亡。基辅市长已宣布为遇难者举行哀悼日。

Tags: ukraine · russia · war

item.title: 亚马逊已部署足够卫星以推出 Starlink 竞品
item.description:
Amazon has enough satellites to launch its Starlink competitor

Amazon has reached a milestone with 396 satellites in low-Earth orbit for its project Kuiper. The company states this is sufficient to support continuous internet service across initial latitudes.

亚马逊在其 Kuiper 项目中已成功部署 396 颗低轨卫星。公司表示，这足以支持初步纬度地区的持续互联网服务。

Tags: amazon · starlink · satellite

item.title: 沃什的言论引发市场对货币贬值的关注
item.description:
Warsh’s throwaway comment injects life into the debasement trade, for one day at least

New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's comments, despite his intention to avoid market steering, have triggered a day of increased focus on currency debasement. Investors reacted strongly to his perceived signal.

美联储新主席凯文·沃什的言论尽管旨在避免引导市场，却引发了一天内对货币贬值的广泛关注。投资者对其释放的信号反应强烈。

Tags: fed · economy · finance

item.title: Tamera Mowry 以 270 万美元挂牌出售湾区房产
item.description:
Tamera Mowry lists Bay Area house for $2.7 million as she prepares to build Napa Valley ‘dream home’

Actress Tamera Mowry-Housley has listed her Bay Area home for $2.7 million. She is moving to focus on building her dream home in Napa Valley.

演员塔梅拉·莫里-豪斯利以 270 万美元挂牌出售其湾区房产。她目前正忙于在纳帕谷建造自己的梦想家园。

Tags: realestate · celebrity · napa

item.title: 为什么加州的碳粪肥政策逻辑不通
item.description:
Why California’s carbon manure math doesn’t add up

California's climate policy pays cattle farmers to convert methane from manure into natural gas, a practice critics argue is environmentally counterproductive. The system faces scrutiny for failing to properly account for emissions.

加州的气候政策通过补贴将牲畜粪便中的甲烷转化为天然气，批评者认为这在环保层面得不偿失。该系统因未能准确核算排放量而受到质疑。

Tags: environment · climate · california

item.title: 谷歌输掉最终上诉，维持 47 亿美元欧盟罚款
item.description:
After eight years, Google loses final appeal against $4.7 billion European Union fine

The European Court of Justice has upheld the $4.7 billion fine imposed on Google for anti-competitive practices. This marks the conclusion of an eight-year legal battle.

欧洲法院维持了因反竞争行为对谷歌处以的 47 亿美元罚款。这标志着这场长达八年的法律诉讼最终落下帷幕。

Tags: google · antitrust · eu

item.title: 享道出行深陷“高德税”，盈利能力引发关注
item.description:
享道被困16%的“高德税”

Xiangdao Chuxing is pushing for its second IPO attempt while dealing with high commissions from aggregator platforms like Amap. The company is struggling with the balance between rising orders and stagnant driver numbers.

享道出行在第二次 IPO 冲刺中面临着聚合平台高佣金的压力。公司正艰难平衡订单量增长与活跃司机数增长停滞之间的矛盾。

Tags: ipo · ridehailing · finance

item.title: OpenAI 考虑向政府转让 5% 股权
item.description:
OpenAI reportedly considers handing 5% stake to the government. Here’s why the AI lab would consider that move.

OpenAI is reportedly considering offering 5% of its equity to the government to mitigate public and regulatory criticism. This strategic move aims to improve the company's standing amid rising AI concerns.

据报道，OpenAI 正考虑将 5% 的股权转让给政府，以缓解外界对其的批评。此举旨在改善公司在日益严峻的 AI 监管环境中的地位。

Tags: openai · equity · regulation

item.title: 定理经济的衰落
item.description:
The Fall of the Theorem Economy

A discussion on the decline of what is termed the 'theorem economy' in the tech and research landscape. Experts explore the implications of changing funding and interest in theoretical work.

文章探讨了科技与研究领域中所谓“定理经济”的衰落。专家们分析了理论研究资金与兴趣转向所带来的深远影响。

Tags: economy · theory · research

item.title: 寻找合适的掌机，给童年一份礼物
item.description:
共创试读 | 给童年一份礼物：从是什么到为什么，找到合适的掌机

With the retro gaming wave, many players are exploring old consoles and modern open-source handhelds. This guide helps enthusiasts choose the right device to revisit their childhood games.

随着复古浪潮的兴起，许多玩家开始关注老旧游戏机和开源掌机。本指南旨在帮助玩家选择合适的设备，重温童年游戏回忆。

Tags: gaming · retro · handheld

item.title: 古瑞瓦特：净利润大幅下滑，储能业务寻求上市
item.description:
秋声 | 净利从8.4亿跌到1987万，深圳光伏老兵靠储能再冲港股

Growatt, a solar inverter veteran, is seeking a Hong Kong IPO for the third time after a significant decline in net profits. The company is banking on its energy storage systems to revive its financial trajectory.

光伏逆变器老兵古瑞瓦特在净利润大幅下滑后，第三次冲击港股 IPO。公司寄希望于储能系统业务能带动业绩回升。

Tags: ipo · solar · energy

item.title: BBC 揭露被定罪的人口贩子在英国寻求庇护
item.description:
People smuggler convicted in France found by BBC living in UK and seeking asylum

An individual previously convicted in France for human trafficking has been found living in the UK. The report highlights ongoing controversies regarding asylum seeker management.

一名曾在法国因人口贩运被定罪的男子被发现居住在英国。该报道凸显了英国在难民管理方面持续存在的争议。

Tags: crime · immigration · uk

item.title: 加沙患者撤离面临痛苦的延误
item.description:
'Two weeks after her death I got a call': Gaza patients face agonising delays for evacuation

Palestinian patients referred for medical treatment outside Gaza face agonizing delays in evacuation. Many have tragically died while waiting for necessary clearance.

被转诊至加沙外接受医疗的巴勒斯坦患者在撤离过程中面临痛苦的延误。许多人在等待许可的过程中不幸离世。

Tags: gaza · humanitarian · health

item.title: Kimi K2.7 代码模型在 GitHub Copilot 全面上线
item.description:
Kimi K2.7 Code is generally available in GitHub Copilot

The Kimi K2.7 code model is now generally available for use within GitHub Copilot. Developers can access its advanced coding capabilities directly through the platform.

Kimi K2.7 代码模型现已在 GitHub Copilot 中全面可用。开发者可以直接通过该平台使用其高级编程功能。

Tags: kimi · copilot · coding

item.title: Steam Machine：家用游戏机的新选择
item.description:
家用游戏机的新选择，Steam Machine 玩起来怎么样？

This article explores the experience of using Steam Machines as home gaming consoles. It evaluates their performance and feasibility for players looking for a living room PC experience.

本文探讨了将 Steam Machine 作为家用游戏机的使用体验。文章评估了其性能，并分析了该设备对客厅 PC 玩家的可行性。

Tags: steam · gaming · hardware

item.title: 谷歌发现一种新的 Android 恶意软件
item.description:
A new Android malware from Google

Google has identified a new strain of Android malware targeting mobile users. Security teams are working to patch vulnerabilities and protect devices.

谷歌发现了一种针对 Android 用户的新型恶意软件。安全团队正在努力修复漏洞，以保护用户设备。

Tags: android · malware · security

item.title: 清华与中科院团队研发康养转运机器人
item.description:
36氪首发 | 清华、中科院团队联合华西医院研发康养转运机器人，进一步布局居家养老场景

A team from Tsinghua and CAS, in partnership with West China Hospital, has developed a robotic assistant for elderly care. The project focuses on automated patient transfer and home companionship.

清华大学、中科院团队联合华西医院研发了一款针对居家养老的机器人。该项目专注于自动化转运患者与家庭陪伴场景。

Tags: robotics · healthcare · elderly

item.title: 北大团队纳开量子完成融资，工程化量子计算
item.description:
36氪首发丨北大博士量子团队获高瓴创投领投，国内唯一实现纳开温区量子计算机工程化

NAKAI Quantum, a Peking University-backed team, has secured initial funding to advance neutral atom-based quantum computing. The company is focused on the engineering and commercial delivery of quantum computers.

北大系量子初创公司“纳开量子”完成首轮融资，致力于中性原子量子计算机的研发。公司专注于量子计算的工程化与商业化交付。

Tags: quantum · computing · tech

item.title: 委内瑞拉地震男孩获救，阿姨承诺给予照顾
item.description:
Aunt of Venezuelan boy pulled from rubble tells BBC she will give him 'mother's warmth'

A two-year-old boy rescued from rubble after the earthquake in Venezuela will be cared for by his aunt. She has promised to provide him with the 'mother's warmth' he needs to recover.

一名在委内瑞拉地震后从废墟中获救的两岁男孩将由其阿姨照顾。她承诺给予他所需的关爱，帮助他恢复生活。

Tags: earthquake · rescue · humanitarian

item.title: ZCode：GLM-5.2 的指令接口
item.description:
ZCode – Harness for GLM-5.2

ZCode serves as a new harness or interface for the GLM-5.2 model. This tool aims to streamline integration for developers working with the large language model.

ZCode 作为 GLM-5.2 模型的新接口或指令适配器发布。该工具旨在简化开发者在集成大型语言模型时的流程。

Tags: glm · llm · api

item.title: 科学家是否真的凭空创造了活细胞？还未完全实现
item.description:
Have scientists really made a living cell from scratch? Not quite

Researchers have created a prototype cell using existing bacterial genes, but it lacks the full capability of a true living organism. While a breakthrough, it is not yet artificial life in the complete sense.

研究人员利用现有细菌基因创造了一个原型细胞，但它尚不具备真正生物体的完整功能。虽然是一项突破，但这还不能被称为完整的人造生命。

Tags: biology · science · genetics

item.title: Claude Anthropic 主动遵守中国法律为什么要被骂？
item.description:
[Claude] Anthropic 主动遵守中国法律为什么要被骂？

Some users are criticizing Anthropic for complying with Chinese AI regulations and restricting service to mainland China. The author argues this is a legal necessity for a foreign company and suggests users should appreciate the move rather than complain.

文章探讨了 Anthropic 因主动遵守中国相关法规而遭到部分用户谩骂的现象。作者认为这是跨国企业必须履行的合规要求，并呼吁用户理性看待这一行为。

Tags: anthropic · claude · compliance

item.title: 大家避雷京东吧 买到二手退货和残次品组装的后封机
item.description:
[Apple] 大家避雷京东吧 买到二手退货和残次品组装的后封机 客服竟然帮腔说叫资源机

A user warns others against buying iPhones from JD.com after receiving what they claim is a refurbished or defective device. They express frustration with customer service for labeling these as 'resource machines.'

用户吐槽在京东购买手机时遭遇疑似二手翻新或残次品，并对客服将该设备称为“资源机”的行为表示极度不满。

Tags: jd · iphone · complaint

item.title: 有 root 的 Flutter 安卓如何后台执行任务
item.description:
[Android] 有 root 的 Flutter 安卓如何后台执行任务

The author is seeking advice on running background tasks for a Flutter-based network tool on a rooted Android device. They face issues with task stability and execution delays when the app is in the background.

开发者寻求在已 root 的安卓设备上，利用 Flutter 实现稳定的后台定时任务方案。目前遇到的核心难点在于后台进程会被系统限制或执行偏移。

Tags: flutter · android · root

item.title: SparkCloud 国际网络加速七月活动
item.description:
[推广] SparkCloud 国际网络加速七月活动

SparkCloud is launching a July promotion for its international network acceleration service. The provider highlights features like zero censorship and multi-node support while offering a discount code.

SparkCloud 发布了七月促销活动，提供国际网络加速服务。该服务主打无审计、全中转节点及流媒体解锁等优势。

Tags: network · proxy · promotion

item.title: Mind The Gap
item.description:
Mind The Gap

This article discusses current financial market trends and gaps that investors should pay attention to. It provides an overview of sector performance and potential investment risks.

文章分析了当前金融市场的趋势及值得投资者关注的缺口。内容涉及行业表现评估及潜在的投资风险提示。

Tags: finance · investing · market

item.title: Gerresheimer AG 2025 Q4 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation
item.description:
Gerresheimer AG 2025 Q4 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation

Gerresheimer AG presents its 2025 fourth-quarter financial results during an earnings call. The report highlights performance metrics and strategic growth plans for the upcoming fiscal year.

Gerresheimer AG 发布了 2025 年第四季度财报，并在电话会议中展示了经营业绩与未来战略规划。

Tags: gerresheimer · earnings · finance

item.title: ABIVAX 讨论 Obefazimod 在溃疡性结肠炎中的数据
item.description:
ABIVAX Société Anonyme (ABVX) Discusses ABTECT Maintenance Part 2 Results and Updated Obefazimod Safety and Efficacy Data in Ulcerative Colitis - Slideshow

ABIVAX shares updated clinical data on its drug Obefazimod for treating ulcerative colitis. The presentation highlights safety and efficacy results from their latest maintenance studies.

ABIVAX 公布了药物 Obefazimod 在治疗溃疡性结肠炎中的最新临床数据。报告详细介绍了药物的安全性及长期疗效表现。

Tags: biotech · abivax · clinicaltrials

item.title: Iridium 与 Rocket Lab 的并购会议
item.description:
Iridium Communications Inc. (IRDM) Rocket Lab Corporation - M&A Call - Slideshow

Iridium Communications discusses its strategic M&A call regarding Rocket Lab. The presentation details the rationale and potential impacts of this deal on the satellite communications industry.

Iridium Communications 就与 Rocket Lab 的并购事宜举行会议。双方讨论了该交易对卫星通信行业的影响及战略布局。

Tags: iridium · rocketlab · merger

item.title: Neurogene Inc. 更新 NGN-401 基因疗法数据
item.description:
Neurogene Inc. (NGNE) Discusses Updated Phase 1/2 Data for NGN-401 Gene Therapy in Rett Syndrome - Slideshow

Neurogene Inc. provides updated Phase 1/2 clinical data for its gene therapy NGN-401 for Rett syndrome. The results demonstrate positive safety and therapeutic trends.

Neurogene Inc. 更新了治疗瑞特综合征的基因疗法 NGN-401 的临床一/二期数据。研究显示该疗法具备良好的安全性和潜在疗效。

Tags: neurogene · genetherapy · medicine

item.title: 问与答：想问一下像我这样的人有吗
item.description:
[问与答] 想问一下像我这样的人有吗

The author shares personal struggles with social anxiety, low self-esteem, and relationship building. They reflect on how internet addiction has contributed to their social isolation.

作者倾诉了自己在社交交往、自信心及情感维护方面的困惑。文章反思了网络沉迷如何导致其社交能力退化及价值观单一。

Tags: psychology · social · reflection

item.title: 墨西哥城庆祝世界杯导致三人死亡
item.description:
Three killed in Mexico City World Cup celebrations

Celebrations in Mexico City following the national team's win over Ecuador resulted in three deaths. Over one million people took to the streets to mark the occasion.

墨西哥城在庆祝国家队击败厄瓜多尔队时发生意外，导致三人死亡。当时有超过一百万市民走上街头参与庆祝活动。

Tags: mexico · worldcup · incident

item.title: Asahi Linux 7.1 进度报告
item.description:

item.title: G7易流发布货运行业首款穿戴式AI硬件「拍拍豆」，填平物流交付的“最后两米”
item.description:
G7易流发布货运行业首款穿戴式AI硬件「拍拍豆」，填平物流交付的“最后两米”｜最前线

G7 Connect has launched 'Paipaido', a wearable AI device for the logistics industry designed to record delivery processes. The device aims to bridge the transparency gap in the 'last two meters' of goods handover.

G7易流推出货运行业首款穿戴式AI硬件“拍拍豆”。该设备旨在通过记录交付细节，打通物流交付过程中的透明度盲区。

item.title: Anthropic的Mythos 5回归
item.description:
Anthropic’s Mythos 5 is back

After intense negotiations with the US government, Anthropic's Mythos 5 model is partially available again to select organizations. A public-facing version remains restricted for the time being.

经过与美国政府的激烈谈判，Anthropic的Mythos 5模型终于恢复对部分机构的可用性。面向公众的通用版本目前仍受限制。

Tags: anthropic · ai · 模型

item.title: 追赶FSD V14，理想在补哪些课？
item.description:
追赶FSD V14，理想在补哪些课？｜最前线

Li Auto is doubling down on in-house research for autonomous driving, specifically focusing on data loops and AI infrastructure to catch up with Tesla's FSD V14. The company is investing in custom chips and VLA models.

理想汽车正加码自动驾驶自研，致力于通过数据闭环和AI基础设施追赶特斯拉FSD V14。公司正大力投入自研芯片与大模型技术。

Tags: 自动驾驶 · 理想汽车 · ai

item.description:
Meloni and Trump: A very public fall-out that is proving very hard to fix

The once-close political relationship between Italian PM Meloni and Donald Trump has soured into personal insults. Repairing this alliance is proving to be a significant diplomatic challenge.

意大利总理梅洛尼与特朗普之间的政治盟友关系已破裂，并演变为公开的人身攻击。修复这种外交关系目前难度极大。

item.title: 为什么动能随速度呈平方而非线性增加？（2011）
item.description:
Why does kinetic energy increase quadratically, not linearly, with speed? (2011)

A revisited explanation of the physics principle where kinetic energy is proportional to the square of velocity. The post clarifies the underlying mechanical and mathematical concepts.

重温物理学经典解释：为何动能与速度的平方成正比。文章阐述了相关的力学原理及数学逻辑。

Tags: 物理 · 科普 · 科学

item.description:

item.title: ServiceNow、Salesforce等软件股上涨，OpenAI威胁减弱
item.description:
ServiceNow, Salesforce and other software stocks surge as the OpenAI threat weakens

Enterprise software stocks rallied as market concerns over OpenAI's disruption softened. Oracle, however, lagged behind due to its direct financial ties to OpenAI's infrastructure.

受OpenAI威胁减弱的影响，企业软件股票全线走强。Oracle因与OpenAI的云业务关联而表现相对逊色。

Tags: 软件 · openai · 美股

item.title: 母亲在委内瑞拉地震中为救女儿牺牲
item.description:
Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes

Heartbreaking reports from Venezuela reveal that a mother died while protecting her daughter during the earthquake. The tragedy highlights the human cost of the disaster.

委内瑞拉地震中传来悲剧消息，一位母亲在保护女儿时不幸遇难。此事件揭示了这场灾难背后惨重的人道代价。

item.title: 欧洲致命热浪打破德国纪录并导致公共活动暂停
item.description:
Europe's deadly heatwave breaks German record and halts public events

A severe heatwave in Europe has pushed German temperatures to a record 41.3C. Public events have been halted as authorities respond to the extreme weather crisis.

欧洲遭受致命热浪袭击，德国气温创下41.3摄氏度的历史新高。多地被迫暂停公共活动以应对极端天气。

Tags: 环境 · 热浪 · 气候

item.title: GitHub 与联合国开发计划署合作，利用开源技术推进加纳的发展优先事项
item.description:
GitHub and UNDP team up to advance development priorities in Ghana with open source

GitHub and the UNDP are collaborating in Ghana to use open-source governance for digital reform. This partnership aims to leverage technology for sustainable development.

GitHub 与联合国开发计划署在加纳开展合作，旨在通过开源治理推动数字改革。此次伙伴关系旨在利用技术助力可持续发展。

Tags: github · undp · opensource

item.title: 我因为罕见基因有100%的几率患癌
item.description:
I have a 100 per cent chance of getting cancer due to a rare gene

A personal account of a woman living with a rare TP53 gene variant that carries an extreme cancer risk. She discusses the anxiety and strict medical screening required for her condition.

一名女性分享了她携带罕见TP53基因变异的经历，该基因导致患癌风险极高。她讲述了长期焦虑及严格医学筛查的生活现状。

Tags: 医疗 · 基因 · 健康

item.title: 首次在洞穴壁画上发现古人类 DNA
item.description:
Ancient human DNA found on cave art for the first time

Researchers have identified ancient human DNA on cave walls, providing a new method to study prehistoric art. This discovery could help resolve debates regarding the artistic abilities of Neanderthals.

科学家首次在史前洞穴壁画及墙壁上提取到古人类DNA。该发现为研究史前艺术提供了新视角，或将揭开尼安德特人艺术能力的谜团。

Tags: 考古 · dna · 古人类

item.description:
Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model

OpenAI officially previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a model enhanced for coding, science, and cybersecurity. The release emphasizes advanced safety protocols alongside these technical capabilities.
